sevenDay.synopsis: There's IFR to our E, and it's moving our way, but by 09L or so, we should begin to see some improvement. The rest of the day will be VFR and NEG hazards. IFR sets up early tomorrow AM, lifting by 09L once again. A cold front will move thru late tomorrow leaving VFR, cooler temps, and breezy conditions in its wake for the weekend. The streak of good weather carries over into early next week. Still no rain in sight.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 26 MAR - 01 APR
